title: See what you might qualify for
body: Answer a few questions about your household. We'll show you programs — food help, health coverage, tax credits, cash assistance, utilities — that match your situation. Every match links to the actual rule so you can see for yourself.

title: Make sense of a denial letter
body: Got a letter and don't know what it says or why you were denied? Paste it in and we'll translate it into plain English, explain your options, and draft an appeal you can send.

title: Get through the paperwork
body: Applications are long. We'll walk you through what each question is really asking, what documents you'll need, and where to send it when you're done.
